events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the hydro test proceeded with instruments not isolated, which violates ASME B31.3 §345 preparation requirements and risks damaging pressure-sensitive instrumentation. Decision is `fail` — test must be halted, system bled down, instruments isolated/removed per the test package, and the boundary re-verified before pressurization resumes.
